## Type

- [ ] `type:bug` — fixes incorrect behavior
- [ ] `type:feat` — adds new capability
- [ ] `type:ux` — improves visual output or flow
- [ ] `type:chore` — build, deps, refactor, infra

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (user-facing changes)
